title: API feature to create a Project or convert a Board to a Project and link that Project to a Portfolio

posts.author: Damjan (Damjan Petricevic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

With a release of a new create_portfolio mutation, our client got very excited with this feature.
Problem is that to make that happen, we need to be able to create a Project through API and/or convert created Boards to a Project.
And after that, ability to link that Project to an existing Portfolio.

This feature is highly anticipated by our clients.

e.g. Our automation is currently creating Project based on some templates, but currently they can only be created as regular Board, while creating them as Project right away would be much better, especially if there will be feature to link created Project to a Portfolio

What are you trying to achieve

Create a Project through API and/or convert existing Board to a Project and assign that Project to an existing Portfolio
